summary: Brought the new frontend from origin/Le-Phuoc-Sang/#1 into the dev branch, frontend-only as requested. Verified the new frontend already targets backend on 8096 (apiClient.ts, next.config.mjs) and runs on port 3000, so no config changes were needed. Stopped the old Next dev server, removed the old src/frontend (incl. node_modules), then synced src/frontend exactly from the branch via git rm + git checkout origin/Le-Phuoc-Sang/#1 -- src/frontend (working tree now matches branch, diff empty). Ran npm install (385 packages) and started npm run dev. Smoke tests pass: frontend http://localhost:3000 returns 200 (51KB) and backend http://localhost:8096/api/products returns 200. Backend code (src/main, pom.xml) untouched by this task.
current_status: New Le-Phuoc-Sang frontend is in place at src/frontend and running on http://localhost:3000; backend running on http://localhost:8096 with DB SWP_Nhom3_App. Both servers up in background. Only frontend was changed in this task; earlier backend fixes (DataSeeder, ports, DB) remain.
